name: Ted Oh Golf Studios
about: Ted Oh Golf Studios is a 2,000 square-foot practice facility located in South Bay, featuring four state-of-the-art simulators. The venue is membership-based and allows members and guests to practice or play over 15 golf courses, focusing on providing a comprehensive space to work on all aspects of the swing and game. It operates with a professional coaching ethos, offering lessons and private event hosting in an environment designed for serious practice and game improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to four state-of-the-art simulators for comprehensive swing and game analysis
Convenient private bays allowing for focused, uninterrupted practice sessions
Coaching from renowned instructor Ted Oh and his team, with experience training top tour professionals
Membership options available at reasonable rates for dedicated practice

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of on-site alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state if clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own equipment for the best practice experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on outside food or drinks, so it's best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required to play a full 18 holes. Duration may vary depending on the number of players and simulator software used.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ted Oh Golf Studios is open to golfers of all ages and encourages family play sessions, making it a suitable environment for juniors and youth golfers.
